scam_sample.warning: Legitimate employers never impose 24-hour payment deadlines or create artificial candidate scarcity. Do not send money or personal information.
scam_sample.original_text: Pay LKR 5000 to confirm your interview slot before 5pm today. Other candidates are waiting for this position.

legit_sample.reassurance: We did not find strong scam signals in this message. You should still verify the employer independently before sharing sensitive information.
legit_sample.original_text: Hi, thanks for applying. We'd like to schedule a short introductory call via our official recruiting calendar.
